channel.title: QFINHUB — New Loan Scenarios & Data
channel.description: New personal finance data, loan scenarios, and calculator updates from QFINHUB. Free financial reference tools.

item.title: $5,000 Emergency Loan at 15% APR — Monthly Payment Calculator
item.description: $5K emergency loan at 15% APR costs $173/month. See why small loans have higher rates and how to borrow less.

item.title: $20,000 Personal Loan at 8% APR — Good Credit Monthly Payment Calculator
item.description: $20K personal loan at 8% APR = $405/month. Good credit saves you $7,461 vs fair credit. See the math.

item.title: Consolidate $25,000 Debt at 10% APR — Monthly Payment & Savings Calculator
item.description: Consolidating $25K credit card debt at 10% saves ~$24,000 vs keeping it on cards at 25% APR.

item.title: $20,000 Personal Loan at 20% APR — Fair Credit Cost Calculator & Warning
item.description: $20K at 20% APR = $530/month. You'll pay 60% of the loan in interest. Is this loan worth it?

item.title: Personal Loan Payment Table — Compare Monthly Payments by Amount & Rate
item.description: Quick-reference loan payment table: compare $5K-$30K loans at rates from 8% to 20%. Free, no signup.

item.title: Free Financial Data Tables — Loan Payments, Mortgage Affordability & More
item.description: Free financial reference data: loan payment tables, mortgage affordability tables. Downloadable CSV. Cite our data.
